pluginDescription: Filter candidate stations by callsign/prefix rules or advanced regex keep rules.
filterOverviewDesc: Choose a filter mode first, then enter rules. Leave rules empty to disable callsign filtering.
filterModeDesc: Choose simple callsign/prefix blocklist filtering or advanced regex keep filtering.
filterRulesDesc: Callsign / prefix / regex rules shared by all bands.
filterRulesBlocklistDesc: Enter one callsign or prefix to filter out per line, e.g. BG5DRB or JA.
filterRulesRegexKeepDesc: Enter one regex to keep matching callsigns per line, e.g. ^JA or ^(BG5DRB|K1ABC)$.
filterRulesInvalidRegexSyntax: Line {{line}} has invalid regex syntax. Please check the expression.
filterRulesInvalidBandRegexSyntax: {{band}} line {{line}} has invalid regex syntax. Please check the expression.
perBandEnabledDesc: Off: all bands use the common rules. On: only the current band's rules are used.
bandFilterRulesDesc: Enter separate rules for each band. When per-band rules are on, bands without rules do not filter any callsigns.
bandFilterRulesBlocklistDesc: Enter one callsign or prefix to filter out per line for each band. Empty bands do not filter.
bandFilterRulesRegexKeepDesc: Enter one regex to keep matching callsigns per line for each band. Empty bands do not filter.
filterScopeDesc: Choose whether rules only affect auto-reply target selection, or also filter the message panel.
